summary: AI Modules (Phase 1-6 Institutional-Grade Features) - All Features Verified. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: AI Modules panel with Shadow Mode toggle and 4 module toggles (Bull/Bear Debate, AI Risk Manager, Institutional Flow, Time Series AI) all working correctly.

ai_module_config_api.details: Returns full module configuration with all 4 modules: debate_agents, ai_risk_manager, institutional_flow, timeseries_ai

ai_module_status_api.details: Returns quick status summary with active_modules count and shadow_mode state

module_toggle_api.details: Successfully toggles all 4 modules on/off, returns 400 for invalid module names

global_shadow_mode_api.details: Sets global shadow mode on/off, also supports per-module shadow mode

bull_bear_debate_api.details: Returns debate result with bull_score, bear_score, winner, final_recommendation, reasoning

ai_risk_assessment_api.details: Returns assessment with total_risk_score, risk_level (low/moderate/high/extreme), recommendation, factors

institutional_ownership_api.details: Returns institutional ownership context with summary, signals, risk_score, recommendation (favorable/neutral/caution)

rebalance_risk_api.details: Returns rebalance risk analysis with risks list and has_rebalance_risk flag

volume_analysis_api.details: Analyzes volume profile with rvol, zscore, volume_trend, signals, recommendation

volume_anomaly_detection_api.details: Detects volume anomalies (3x normal volume triggers spike detection), returns anomaly_type, zscore, signal

shadow_tracker_stats_api.details: Returns shadow tracker statistics with total_decisions, pending_outcomes, executed_decisions

shadow_decisions_api.details: Returns logged AI decisions with symbol and combined_recommendation

shadow_performance_api.details: Returns performance metrics for each module (debate_agents, ai_risk_manager, institutional_flow, timeseries_ai)

details: AI Modules tab present in SENTCOM settings panel (data-testid='settings-tab-ai')

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 AI modules (debate_agents, ai_risk_manager, institutional_flow, timeseries_ai) properly initialized in server.py
AI Module Config service correctly manages module toggles with MongoDB persistence
Shadow Tracker properly logs AI decisions for learning without execution
Debate Agents implement rule-based Bull/Bear scoring (can be enhanced with LLM later)
Risk Manager provides multi-factor risk assessment with configurable thresholds
Institutional Flow returns placeholder data pending full SEC EDGAR integration (as documented)
Volume Anomaly detection uses z-score based spike detection
Frontend AIModulesPanel component properly integrates with backend APIs via useAIModules hook

mocked_apis_list: Institutional ownership context returns placeholder data pending full SEC EDGAR API integration (as documented by main agent)
mocked_apis.note: All other APIs return real computed results

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Modules fully tested. All 12 endpoints working: /api/ai-modules/config, /status, /toggle/{module}, /shadow-mode, /debate/run, /risk/assess, /institutional/context/{symbol}, /institutional/rebalance-risk/{symbol}, /volume/analyze, /volume/detect, /shadow/stats, /shadow/decisions, /shadow/performance. Frontend has AI Modules tab in SENTCOM Settings panel with Shadow Mode toggle and 4 individual module toggles.
